title: Percy
writer: William Henry Hamby, J.G. Hawks, Eve Unsell
actors: Charles Ray, Louise Dresser, Joseph Kilgour
plot: Percy Rogeen's father fears his son will never be a man, but only a mama's boy. When a friend of Mr. Rogeen promises to help the boy shape up, the father is delighted. But the help comes in the shape of a bottle, and Percy finds h...
